title: tricostularia undulata
intro: Tricostularia undulata, also known as the wavy tricostularia, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tricostularia undulata include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory tract irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to extract its medicinal compounds.
